title: Critter Barriers
description: Rope and chain curtains that block small critters from going trough them.
body:
This mod adds curtains made out of Rope and Chain, allowing players and other large mobs to pass, while smaller mobs are to weak to get trough them.

The mobs are data driven so you can add support for other mods and fully customize which mobs should be able to go trough and which not.
